title: Coding-agents can replicate scientific machine learning papers
acquisition_purpose: Primary-source acquisition for review-paper-replication-workspace-evidence-validity; this record is not a deep review or release audit.

paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v2 API entry contains one normal entry, a substantive abstract, and no withdrawal or retraction notice.
paper.extraction_status: The complete immutable 16-page v2 PDF extracted successfully. Readable continuity was inspected across the title and abstract, motivation and related benchmarks, target/evidence workflow, reported scalar-fidelity and run-variation results, completion claim boundaries, code/data statement, references, and final page. This acquisition record does not constitute a deep review.

official_repository.identity_evidence: The paper's code and data availability statement explicitly links this repository. The acquired top-level README identifies it as the release bundle accompanying the Paper-replication manuscript and enumerates the skills, twelve case-study workspaces, and analysis materials.
official_repository.license: Apache-2.0 according to the GitHub repository API; a top-level LICENSE file is present in the acquired archive. Embedded source-paper materials also carry their own license files and require artifact-specific inspection before reuse.
official_repository.archive_test: passed: unzip integrity test and Python ZipFile CRC test returned no corrupt member
official_repository.inventory_status: Static inventory confirms two framework-specific SKILL.md files, exactly twelve run/paper workspace groups (three runs for each of PIFT, PINN-I, PINN-II, and SINDy), 106 paths containing 'targets', 175 containing 'provenance', report artifacts for the case studies, and 47 analysis files. The release was not deeply audited, replayed, or mutation-tested during acquisition.
official_repository.timing_boundary: The requested commit is 2 days 23 hours 12 minutes 24 seconds after the initial v1 submission timestamp and 4 days 12 hours 38 minutes 18 seconds before the v2 update timestamp. It is the task-pinned official release evidence, but acquisition alone does not prove byte identity with every artifact used to prepare v2.

acquisition_scope: Complete immutable-v2 paper metadata/PDF/text plus the requested commit-pinned official repository archive and GitHub commit/repository metadata. The archive was integrity-tested and inventoried without extraction; no released analysis, validators, experiments, or model calls were executed.
claim_boundary: This evidence supports a later full-paper and release audit. Acquisition alone does not establish scientific correctness, independent replication, completeness of agent-authored targets, fidelity of acceptance rules, general procedural-skill efficacy, repeatability, professional capability, construct validity, or deployment readiness.
